overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a first-person perspective walking through a sunny grassland prairie. The player encounters two horseback riders passing by, then explores an abandoned wooden cabin with a broken fence and water pump before continuing into the open wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail with rocky outcrops

events.description: two horseback riders appear on the trail ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through grassland toward the rocky hills

entered.detail: winding dirt path cutting through tall grass
dense cluster of evergreen trees on the left hillside
large gray rock formation rising from the grassland
sloped terrain covered in green and golden tall grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit prairie trail winding through grassland. The camera moves forward along the dirt path with pine trees visible on the left and a large rocky outcrop on the right. Toward the end of the segment, two horseback riders appear in the distance ahead.

events.description: two riders on horseback pass by closely on the left and center
abandoned wooden cabin comes into view on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as riders pass by, approaching a derelict cabin structure

notable_agents.action: rider on dark horse passing by closely on the left side
rider on brown horse passing by in the center of the frame

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden cabin with missing roof sections and weathered logs
weathered wooden fence posts near the cabin entrance

segments.scene_description: The two riders approach and pass by the camera on horseback, moving from center to left. After they exit the frame, the camera continues forward revealing an abandoned log cabin with a broken fence on the right. The rocky outcrop remains visible in the background as the cabin becomes the focal point.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned homestead with derelict cabin and broken fencing

events.description: camera turns right to circle around the cabin structure
passing by wooden water pump and collapsed fence sections at the cabin side

agents.ego_description: circling the abandoned cabin to inspect the structure, barrels, and broken fence

entered.detail: old-fashioned hand pump with wooden post and handle
two weathered wooden barrels beside the cabin wall
exposed wooden rafters of the damaged cabin roof

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and circles the dilapidated log cabin, revealing its weathered wooden construction and missing roof sections. Two wooden barrels sit beside the wall, and a broken fence lines the property. The camera passes an old water pump as it moves around the structure, with the rocky hills now behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail leading away from homestead

events.description: leaving the cabin behind and entering open prairie with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking away from the cabin into the open grassland with scattered pine trees

entered.detail: sparse evergreen trees dotting the rolling hills
undulating terrain covered in green and golden grass extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the abandoned homestead behind and continues into the open prairie. The trail winds through rolling grass hills with scattered pine trees visible on the left. The broken fence lines the right side briefly before the landscape opens up completely to the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit prairie trail that leads from an open path to a dilapidated homestead and back into the wilderness. It begins by moving forward along a dirt path flanked by pine trees and a large rocky outcrop, just as two horseback riders appear in the distance. As the riders pass by and exit the frame, the camera continues forward to reveal an abandoned log cabin with a broken fence and the rocky outcrop lingering in the background. The scene then shifts to a close exploration of the weathered structure, circling past wooden barrels and an old water pump while the rocky hills recede. Finally, the camera leaves the homestead behind, winding through rolling grass hills and scattered pines until the landscape opens completely into the open prairie.
